notes: __GL_ExtensionStringVersion=17700 %command% will get the game to work. Game works great after that! Before it was failing when the app was starting up!
title: Return to Castle Wolfenstein

notes:
All I had to do was add this to the Launch Options and the game worked flawlessly.
__GL_ExtensionStringVersion=17700 %command%

That's it.  Awesome!
title: Return to Castle Wolfenstein

notes: It starts then it closes i even used the  __GL_ExtensionStringVersion=17700 %command% command still doesn't work!
title: Return to Castle Wolfenstein

notes: __GL_ExtensionStringVersion=17700 %command% made the game run flawlessly at 91 fps with an integrated GPU. no crashes at all. great experience.
title: Return to Castle Wolfenstein

notes: Runs perfectly for me with no tweaks. I had an issue with it not starting after I changed my monitor and moved the display port connection. The resolution miss match caused the problem, which I think is a problem with the game and not Proton. Fixed by setting the config file setting r_mode=1. Settings at maximum, FPS seems capped to 91FPS. Plays great!
title: Return to Castle Wolfenstein
